title: Sentry
excerpt: description: Capture and log exceptions in Pages Functions using the Sentry Pages Plugin. image: https://developers.cloudflare.com/dev-products-preview.png > Fetch the complete documentation index at: https://developers.cloudflare.com/pages/llms.txt > Use this file to discover all available pages before exploring further. Sentry now provides official support for Cloudflare Workers and Pages. Refer to the [Sentry documentation ↗](https://docs.sentry.io/platforms/javascript/guides/cloudflare/) for more details. The Sentry Pages Plugin captures and logs all exceptions which occur below it in the execution chain of your Pages Functions. It is therefore recommended that you install this Plugin at the root of your application in `functions/_middleware.ts` as the very first Plugin.
